forecasts.reasoning: Based on overwhelming evidence of active tariff policy implementation with specific June 2025 deadlines. Trump administration scheduled 50% tariffs on EU imports effective June 1, modified China tariffs same day, threatened 25% iPhone tariffs by end of June, and faced $23B in EU retaliatory measures. With active trade war and concrete policy implementation dates, near-continuous front-page coverage is virtually certain. Only extreme black swan events could displace such dominant economic news for a full day, and no evidence of such events was found. Probability reduced from initial 25% to 8% given policy schedule density.
